# Detector Precision Checklist: PBGC PII Detection Workflow

**Purpose**: Validate that requirements are clear and complete enough to reduce obvious false positives while preserving PBGC PII detection coverage.  
**Created**: 2026-05-02  
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit-checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [ ] CHK001 Are false-positive handling requirements defined beyond user disposition changes? [Completeness, Spec §User Story 2]
- [ ] CHK002 Are detector-specific precision requirements documented for SSN, phone, address, financial/tax identifiers, IP address, and credentials? [Gap, Spec §FR-007]
- [ ] CHK003 Are requirements defined for recording examples of reviewer-confirmed false positives for future detector refinement? [Gap, Spec §User Story 2]
- [ ] CHK004 Are requirements defined for distinguishing processing limitations from actual PII findings in reports and exports? [Completeness, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK005 Are requirements defined for when a broad pattern should become `needs_review` instead of high-confidence PII? [Gap, Spec §FR-005]

## Requirement Clarity

- [ ] CHK006 Is "matched value handling" clarified to distinguish raw matches, masked values, reviewer-visible values, and suppressed false positives? [Clarity, Spec §FR-005]
- [ ] CHK007 Is "confidence" quantified with rules or thresholds for high-confidence versus low-confidence detections? [Clarity, Spec §FR-005]
- [ ] CHK008 Is "nearby context" defined with measurable context-window expectations or unavailable-context criteria? [Clarity, Spec §FR-005]
- [ ] CHK009 Is "financial or tax identifiers" decomposed into specific identifier classes with separate precision expectations? [Clarity, Spec §FR-007]
- [ ] CHK010 Is the severity scale tied to confidence and context so low-confidence broad matches do not receive inflated severity? [Clarity, Spec §FR-006]

## Requirement Consistency

- [ ] CHK011 Are false-positive review requirements consistent with the export requirement to avoid unnecessary unredacted PII exposure? [Consistency, Spec §FR-010 and §FR-011]
- [ ] CHK012 Are detector precision requirements consistent with PBGC IM 05-09 and IM 10-03 minimization obligations? [Consistency, Spec §PBGC Privacy and Runtime Constraints]
- [ ] CHK013 Are requirements consistent about whether unsupported or browser-limited files appear as findings, limitations, or both? [Consistency, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK014 Are duplicate-occurrence requirements consistent with avoiding duplicate entries for the same occurrence? [Consistency, Spec §Edge Cases]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [ ] CHK015 Does SC-002 define both true-positive and false-positive expectations for the synthetic test set? [Measurability, Spec §SC-002]
- [ ] CHK016 Does SC-003 define how context quality is measured when a finding is ambiguous? [Measurability, Spec §SC-003]
- [ ] CHK017 Are success criteria defined for reviewer burden, such as maximum tolerated obvious false positives in a synthetic review set? [Gap, Success Criteria]
- [ ] CHK018 Are success criteria defined for preserving high-risk true positives while reducing obvious false positives? [Gap, Success Criteria]

## Scenario Coverage

- [ ] CHK019 Are requirements defined for non-PII numeric identifiers that resemble SSNs, phone numbers, routing numbers, or IP addresses? [Coverage, Gap]
- [ ] CHK020 Are requirements defined for version numbers, dates, policy numbers, page numbers, codes, and totals that may match broad numeric patterns? [Coverage, Gap]
- [ ] CHK021 Are requirements defined for address-like text that is not a personal address, such as headings, statute references, or generic examples? [Coverage, Gap]
- [ ] CHK022 Are requirements defined for technical identifiers that are operational metadata rather than individual-identifying data? [Coverage, Gap]
- [ ] CHK023 Are requirements defined for mixed documents where real PII and false positives appear near each other? [Coverage, Gap]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [ ] CHK024 Are requirements defined for repeated false positives across many files so reviewers can apply consistent decisions? [Edge Case, Gap]
- [ ] CHK025 Are requirements defined for values that are PII only when combined with other nearby fields? [Edge Case, Spec §FR-007]
- [ ] CHK026 Are requirements defined for synthetic examples that intentionally contain false positives for each detector family? [Edge Case, Plan §Testing]
- [ ] CHK027 Are requirements defined for retaining audit evidence of suppressions without exposing unnecessary raw values? [Edge Case, Spec §FR-010]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [ ] CHK028 Is the assumption that reviewer judgment will resolve false positives explicitly bounded by detector precision requirements? [Assumption, Spec §Assumptions]
- [ ] CHK029 Are external policy dependencies mapped to detector categories so PBGC-specific false-positive tolerances are not left implicit? [Dependency, Spec §PBGC Privacy and Runtime Constraints]
- [ ] CHK030 Is there a documented path for adding future detector refinements without weakening source-control and version metadata requirements? [Traceability, Spec §FR-019 and §FR-020]

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline
- Link to relevant resources or documentation
- Items are numbered sequentially for easy reference
